data.title: BNB Surpasses 640 USDT with a 1.83% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 22, 2026, 02:55 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 640 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 640.109985 USDT, with a narrowed 1.83% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: SBF's early $200,000 investment in Cursor's funding round would currently be worth approximately $3 billion if it did not sell its stake.
data.description: SpaceX announced today that it has reached a partnership agreement with AI programming startup Cursor, which has granted SpaceX the option to acquire Cursor for $60 billion later this year, or to pay $10 billion to advance the collaboration. Cursor's developer, Anysphere, reportedly completed a $400,000 pre-seed funding round in April 2022, co-invested by Alameda Research and Heroic Ventures. Alameda invested $200,000 in Anysphere, acquiring approximately 5% of the shares. This stake was sold at its original price during FTX's bankruptcy liquidation; if it hadn't been sold, it would currently be worth approximately $3 billion.

data.title: The Reserve Bank of Australia is closely monitoring Anthropic's AI model.
data.description: The Reserve Bank of Australia (RBA) is closely monitoring Anthropic's newly launched "Mythos" artificial intelligence model. Anthropic claims the model is powerful enough to handle sophisticated cyberattacks. In a statement, the RBA said, "We are working with peer regulators, governments, and regulated entities. The RBA will continue to assess the impact of these technological advancements to ensure the continued security and stability of the financial system." Meanwhile, regulators around the world are discussing with financial institutions how to address the cybersecurity risks associated with "Mythos." (Jinshi)

data.title: Suilend responds to Volo security incident: Platform operating normally, user funds safe.
data.description: SuiLend stated in a post on the X platform that all platform functions are currently operating normally, including deposits, loans, withdrawals, and repayments, and user funds have not been affected. Meanwhile, the team is closely monitoring the progress of the previous Volo Protocol security incident and will continue to release updates.

data.title: The Base standalone network upgrade, "Base Azul," is scheduled to launch on the mainnet on May 13th.
data.description: Base has announced that its independent network upgrade, "Base Azul," will launch on the mainnet on May 13, 2026. Azul is already live on the testnet and aims to improve security, performance, and the developer experience. Key updates include: 1. Activating a multi-proof system (combining TEE and ZK proofs) to advance Stage 2 decentralization and enable withdrawals to be completed in as little as one day; 2. Integrating into a single high-performance client stack, base-reth-node and base-consensus, reducing the number of empty blocks from approximately 200 per day to approximately 2, and maintaining burst throughput of 5000 TPS on multiple occasions; 3. Aligning with the Ethereum Osaka execution layer specification.

data.title: Ethena Resumes Cross-Chain Operations for sUSDe and USDe on LayerZero
data.description: Ethena has announced the resumption of cross-chain operations for sUSDe and USDe on LayerZero. According to Foresight News, the platform has reactivated these services across all chains. Ethena has increased the DVN configuration from 2/2 to 4/4 and maintained the existing hourly rate limit of $10 million to enhance security measures.

data.title: MAGA's market capitalization surpasses $20 million, with a daily increase of over 260%.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the market capitalization of MAGA, the Meme coin on the SOL chain, has surged past $20 million, currently trading at $21 million, representing a daily increase of over 260%. The token is described as a community-driven Meme token built around the narrative of "alien disclosures." As countries begin to disclose information about UFOs, UAPs, and extraterrestrial contact, global interest in extraterrestrial life continues to rise. The platform aims to aggregate content related to alien disclosures, UFO sightings, and related cultural topics. Odaily reminds users that the price of Meme coins is highly volatile; investors should exercise caution.

data.title: Crypto Liquidations Surpass $60 Million in One Hour
data.description: According to NS3.AI, recent data from Coinglass reveals that cryptocurrency liquidations have exceeded $60.08 million in the past hour. Notably, short positions made up $59.37 million of this total, highlighting a significant impact on traders betting against the market.

data.title: North Korean Hacker Group Lazarus Releases New macOS Malware Targeting Cryptocurrency
data.description: PANews posted on X (formerly Twitter) that the North Korean hacker group, Lazarus, has launched a new macOS malware toolkit named 'Mach-O Man.' This toolkit is designed to target cryptocurrency and high-value executives. The alert was issued by 23pds, the Chief Information Security Officer at SlowMist, warning users to be cautious of potential risks associated with this new threat.

data.title: U.S. Stock Market Declines Amid Middle East Uncertainty
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump's inconsistent statements regarding a ceasefire and potential military action have led to market unease, according to BlockBeats. This uncertainty has resulted in a decline across all major U.S. stock indices at the close of trading, as investors remain concerned about the situation in the Middle East.

While some believe Trump's approach reflects a degree of deliberation and consideration, these traits are not typically associated with him, as he is often viewed as impulsive and reactive. The market is now awaiting a response from Iran.

data.title: Over $60 million in liquidations occurred across the entire network in the past hour, with $27.46 million in BTC liquidations.
data.description: According to Coinglass data, $60.08 million in positions were liquidated across the network in the past hour, including $59.37 million in short positions and $0.7 million in long positions. In addition, $27.46 million in BTC positions were liquidated and $26.31 million in ETH positions were liquidated.

data.title: The Anthropic model identified 271 security vulnerabilities in the Firefox browser.
data.description: Anthropic's latest AI model, Claude Mythos, identified 271 security vulnerabilities in Mozilla's Firefox browser during testing. These vulnerabilities have recently been fixed, highlighting the potential of AI in cybersecurity. Mozilla stated that the model can efficiently analyze large-scale codebases and locate potential vulnerabilities, a process that previously relied heavily on scarce, highly skilled security researchers. In previous tests, another Claude model discovered 22 critical vulnerabilities. Nevertheless, Mozilla believes that the vulnerabilities discovered by AI remain within the capabilities of top human researchers, but its scalability could potentially change the landscape of attack and defense, giving defenders a systemic advantage for the first time. However, industry experts also warn that the misuse of this technology could exacerbate the risk of automated attacks. (Decrypt)

data.title: Hyperliquid's Technical Focus to Minimize Bureaucracy
data.description: Hyperliquid is maintaining a strictly technical core team to minimize corporate bureaucracy, according to Jeff Yan. He emphasized that Hyperliquid Labs should refrain from undertaking tasks that the community is capable of building independently.

data.title: Trump's unpredictable remarks fueled market concerns about Middle East unrest, causing stock indices to fall.
data.description: According to Al Jazeera reporter Alan Fisher, Trump's inconsistent statements regarding a ceasefire and military action throughout the process were unpopular with the market. All major U.S. stock indexes closed lower due to concerns about uncertainty in the Middle East. However, some argue that Trump's approach was correct, demonstrating a degree of deliberation and weighing of options, though this trait is not typically associated with Trump, who is perceived as more impulsive and reactive. The market is currently awaiting a statement from Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: Etherealize: Ethereum may hit $250,000, with the "productivity money" narrative drawing attention.
data.description: A recent Etherealize research report proposes the "Productive Money" theory, arguing that if Ethereum captures the current monetary premium of approximately $31 trillion (combined with gold and Bitcoin), its implied price could exceed $250,000, far higher than the current level of around $2,300. The report points out that ETH not only possesses traditional monetary attributes such as scarcity, verifiability, and censorship resistance, but also offers an annualized return of approximately 2%–4% through staking, achieving the characteristics of an "interest-bearing" currency, thus distinguishing it from non-productive assets like gold and Bitcoin. Furthermore, ETH in the DeFi system has three sources of demand: collateralized assets, transaction fee burning, and staking lock-up, forming a mechanism for supply contraction and value accumulation. The report believes that with the development of on-chain finance and asset tokenization, ETH is expected to simultaneously possess the dual attributes of "store of value" and "productive asset." However, the report also cautions that achieving this valuation path for ETH still faces multiple uncertainties, including regulatory, technological, and competitive challenges, and its long-term value revaluation depends on the market's acceptance of its monetary attributes.

data.title: Mixed Performance in Crypto Sector as Meme Coins Rise
data.description: The cryptocurrency market displayed varied performance, with the Meme sector experiencing a notable increase of 4.81% over the past 24 hours. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin saw a modest rise of 0.34%, while Ethereum's value edged up by 0.01%. This mixed performance highlights the ongoing volatility and diverse trends within the crypto market.

data.title: Hyperliquid Whale Positions Reach $3.276 Billion
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass reveals that the Hyperliquid platform's whale currently holds positions totaling $3.276 billion. The long positions amount to $1.687 billion, representing 51.49% of the total, while short positions are at $1.589 billion, accounting for 48.51%.

The long positions have incurred a loss of $19.9729 million, whereas the short positions have a loss of $2.0667 million. Notably, a whale address, 0x0ddf..02, has engaged in a 3x leveraged short on BTC at a price of $67,992.1, with an unrealized loss of $8.2809 million.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 77,000 USDT with a 1.79% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 22, 2026, 02:18 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 77,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 77,094.273438 USDT, with a narrowed 1.79% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: An account with a 57% win rate purchased $100,000. The Rockets defeated the Lakers in Game 2 of the first round of the Western Conference playoffs.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, in the Polymarket prediction event for "NBA Western Conference First Round Game 2: Rockets vs. Lakers," an account with a 57% win rate (address: 0x9f2fe025f84839ca81dd8e0338892605702d2ca8) purchased $100,000 worth of bets on the Rockets defeating the Lakers, with an average opening price of 67¢. Game 2 of the NBA Western Conference First Round playoffs between the Rockets and the Lakers will tip off at 10:30 AM Beijing time today. Currently, the series is 1-0, with the Lakers leading. The Lakers' starting lineup is James, Hachimura, Ayton, Smart, and Kennard; the Rockets' starting lineup is Durant, Smith, Shin Jing, Amen, and Okogie. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before prices are set.

data.title: HIVE Digital completes $115 million zero-coupon convertible note financing
data.description: HIVE Digital Technologies, a technology company specializing in cryptocurrency mining and high-performance computing hosting, announced that its subsidiary has completed a $115 million private placement of 0% interest-bearing convertible senior notes (dating to 2031), including a $15 million over-allotment option. HIVE Digital stated that the net proceeds from this financing amount to approximately $109.5 million, which will be primarily used for capital expenditures (including GPU procurement), data center construction, and general corporate purposes, supporting its AI infrastructure expansion strategy. The initial conversion price of the notes is approximately $2.57 per share, representing a premium of approximately 17.5% over the pre-issuance share price, with a capped hedging premium of up to 125%. The zero-interest financing has attracted a new batch of institutional investors and will help achieve its 2026 growth target while reducing capital costs.
